chat.welcomeMessage: Wedding Manager v31.1.1 — Hebrew RTL · ES2025 · Vite 8 · 5341 tests · 0 lint · CI green

instructions: Verify no innerHTML with unsanitized data — textContent or sanitize() only.
All visible strings must use data-i18n='key' (HTML) or t('key') (JS) — both he+en required.
Confirm all colors use CSS custom properties — no hardcoded hex/rgb.
Sheets writes must use enqueueWrite() — never call syncStoreKeyToSheets directly.
Auth gate: isApprovedAdmin(email) is the single source of truth for admin access.
All localStorage keys must use the wedding_v1_ prefix.
Section modules must export mount(), unmount(), and at least one render*() function.
New dependencies must be justified — runtime dep count target is 3.
